description: Animated text overlay with configurable position, font size, and color. Fades in title and body text with upward shift.

font_size.description: Font size for the body text

description: Animated vertical bar chart with progressive bar reveal, value labels, and automatic highlight on the highest bar.

colors.description: Custom color hex codes per bar

highlights.description: Specific bars to highlight with Indicate()

description: Animated line chart with MovingCameraScene tracking, progressive line drawing, data point dots, and highlight indicators.
Animated pie chart with sector reveal and percentage labels positioned radially.
Syntax-highlighted code block with configurable language and line-by-line reveal animation.
Animated Reddit post card with subreddit header, upvote count, username, and comment preview in dark Reddit styling.
Large animated statistic with label, optional subtitle, and dramatic pulse effect. Uses GrowFromCenter for the value.
Styled quote with left accent bar, large opening quote mark, and attribution line. Animated reveal.

preview_config.quote: The market can stay irrational longer than you can stay solvent.

description: Full-screen section title card with optional section number, subtitle, and accent underline animation.
Sequential bullet point reveal with heading, accent underline, and staggered fade-in animation.
Side-by-side comparison layout with center divider, color-coded columns, and animated bullet reveal per side.
Bold fullscreen text statement with dramatic fade-in and optional emphasis word highlighting in accent color.

emphasis_word.description: Word to highlight in accent color

description: Generic data chart dispatcher — routes to specific chart type based on chart_type field. Supports Yahoo Finance enrichment for ticker-based data.

tickers.description: Multiple ticker symbols for multi-line charts

events.description: Event markers with date and label

description: Animated timeseries with MovingCameraScene tracking, event markers, end-of-line value badges, and multi-line support. Supports Yahoo Finance enrichment.

tickers.description: Multiple ticker symbols for multi-line comparison

events.description: Event markers with date and label

value_type.description: Value type — absolute close or percentage change

description: Animated horizontal bar chart with progressive bar stretch, value labels, and automatic highlight on the largest bar.
Multi-series grouped bar chart with color-coded groups, legend, and animated reveal per group.

series.description: Named data series with values per group

description: Animated donut chart with staggered sector reveal, center value/label, and source attribution.

center_value.description: Value displayed in the donut center

description: Animate highlights on actual company PDF reports (annual reports, earnings, SEC filings). Converts a PDF page to a high-res image, then uses Manim to animate highlight rectangles, camera zooms, and sequential reveals on the source document.

text_search.description: Text to search for on the page (resolves to bbox)

description: Camera dive into a specific event date on a timeseries chart. Blurs surrounding context and highlights the target price action with a golden glow rectangle. Supports jump-cut and travel zoom modes.

glow_color.description: Hex color for the glow rectangle

wide_hold.description: Seconds to hold wide chart before zoom

description: Drawdown 'Pain Zone' visualization — semi-transparent area fill between running all-time high and current price during drawdown periods. Shadow dynamically grows and shrinks with the line.
Dual timeseries with dynamic vertical arrow between series and real-time percentage spread label, visualizing the performance gap as lines diverge.

show_delta_arrow.description: Show the delta arrow between series

delta_format.description: Format string for the spread label

description: Background color gradient on timeseries charts that shifts from green to red based on a benchmark index's performance, providing macroeconomic context.

benchmark_ticker.description: Yahoo Finance ticker for the benchmark (e.g. ^GSPC)

description: Three-path future projection from today's price — Optimistic, Realistic, Pessimistic — using configurable compound growth rates with dashed fan-out lines.

optimistic_rate.description: Annual growth rate for bull case

realistic_rate.description: Annual growth rate for base case

pessimistic_rate.description: Annual growth rate for bear case

description: Spider/radar chart comparing two companies across multiple metrics with overlapping semi-transparent polygons, sequential animation, and Indicate on the max-advantage axis.
Central entity with component parts flying out radially or in grid layout, with sentiment color-coding and highlight emphasis on the key driver or risk factor.
Dispatcher — routes to simple (white bg, line chart) or terminal (dark, candlestick) variant based on data.variant field. Defaults to simple.

shock_date.description: ISO date of the shock event

shock_label.description: Text label displayed near the flash line

variant.description: Visual variant: simple (white line chart) or terminal (TradingView candlestick)

description: White-background editorial line chart with vertical flash line, camera shake, shock dot, and narrative ending. Clean and fast — ideal for quick explainers.

shock_date.description: ISO date of the shock event

shock_label.description: Text label displayed near the flash line

description: TradingView dark-theme candlestick chart with volume bars, SMA 9/20, Bollinger Bands, OHLC header, and shock event animation. Full terminal look for deep-dive analysis.

shock_date.description: ISO date of the shock event

shock_label.description: Text label displayed near the flash line

description: Dynamic glow intensity and color on timeseries line based on rolling slope — neon trail for high-momentum periods, fade for cooling.

momentum_window.description: Rolling slope window in data points

glow_threshold_sigma.description: Std deviations above mean slope to activate glow

description: Labeled color-coded background zones on timeseries for economic eras with sequential zone reveal, providing temporal context.
Variable playback speed across configurable time segments — fast-forward for boring periods, slow-mo for crashes.

transition_frames.description: Frames to interpolate between adjacent speed regimes

description: Animated directional arrows between labeled entities with arrow thickness proportional to flow amount and sequential flow reveal.
Exponential growth curve with dramatic glow pulse at the breakpoint where compounding visually kicks in, with optional doubling markers.

rate.description: Annual growth rate as decimal (e.g. 0.10 for 10%)

breakpoint_year.description: Year at which glow pulse fires; auto-detected if omitted

description: Area fills between competing timeseries lines with color-coded territory ownership and dominance shift visualization at crossover points.
Vertical percentile ladder with labeled bands and animated marker settling into position, showing where a current value sits in its historical distribution.
